parameters.jsCode: const T=$env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;const CHAT=$env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID;const j=$json;const text='Recruiter ALERT: '+String(j.subject||'(no subject)')+' | From: '+String(j.from||'')+' | Why: '+String(j.reason||'');await this.helpers.httpRequest({url:'https://api.telegram.org/bot'+T+'/sendMessage',method:'POST',json:true,body:{chat_id:CHAT,text:text}});return [{json:{alerted:true}}];
